pathAssistantSteps.info:
Agreement with an In Negotiation Status indicates that the approval is being processed by internal teams (i.e. KYC due diligence, etc.)

  1. Agreement should be linked to a Company
  2. Legal Entity should be created in the system and it should be linked to the relevant Company
  3. Agreement Roles should contained the Legal Entities and the relevant roles (cf. check the Counterparties Mapping in case of question)
  4. Rebates Section should be completed:
    1. An Effective Date must be selected
      1. If the Agreement is Permanent, the Grid End Date should be empty
      2. If the Agreement is NOT Permanent, the relevant date should be detailed in the Grid End Date

Agreement with a Rejected Status indicates that the approval has been rejected:

  1. Update the relevant information and re-submit your request
  2. Click on Submit for Approval button to finalize it + Include in the text box any relevant additional information
  3. Recall the request if you need to do any change to the initial request


Below the request you can submit:

  1. Request Grid Renewal
    1. Select the relevant Grid in the Grid Request field
    2. Complete the Grid Request Start Date field
  2. Request Renewal
    1. Select the new End Date in the Renewal Request Date field
  3. Request a Termination (Closure of the Agreement)
    1. Complete the Termination Description Field (Mandatory)
    2. Select the Cancellation date if you know it (Mandatory for Legal / Optional for CRMs)

Agreement with a Signed Status indicates that the contract has been signed by both parties: Client Counterparty and Carmignac:

  1. The Agreement should have the relevant Code, Name & Company
  2. Agreement Roles should be validated
  3. Rebates Section should be completed
  4. The Signature Date - indicating the day of signature of the Agreement by both parties - must be specified in the Signed Date field
Agreement with a Terminated Status indicates that the contract have been closure.
